---
title: "Follow-up Dashboard"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-21"
runtime: shiny
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE
)

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(shiny)
  library(dplyr)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(plotly)
  library(DT)
  library(readr)
  library(scales)
})
```

```{r}
data <- read_csv(
  "/Users/tianjiah/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-MichiganStateUniversity/Data Manager/Data-Manager/Follow-up Dashboard/dashboard_detail.csv",
  show_col_types = FALSE
) %>%
  mutate(
    eligible_flag = as.numeric(eligible_flag),
    Score = as.numeric(Score)
  )
```

```{r, UI}
ui <- fluidPage(
  titlePanel("Follow-up Team Dashboard"),
  
  sidebarLayout(
    sidebarPanel(
      selectInput(
        "staff",
        "Select staff:",
        choices = c("All", sort(unique(na.omit(data$staff)))),
        selected = "All"
      ),
      
      selectInput(
        "event_short",
        "Select event:",
        choices = c("All", sort(unique(na.omit(data$event_short)))),
        selected = "All"
      ),
      
      selectInput(
        "statusId",
        "Select statusId:",
        choices = c("All", sort(unique(na.omit(data$statusId)))),
        selected = "All"
      )
    ),
    
    mainPanel(
      fluidRow(
        column(
          width = 4,
          wellPanel(
            h4("Denominator"),
            textOutput("denominator")
          )
        ),
        column(
          width = 4,
          wellPanel(
            h4("Numerator"),
            textOutput("numerator")
          )
        ),
        column(
          width = 4,
          wellPanel(
            h4("Progress"),
            textOutput("progress")
          )
        )
      ),
      
      tabsetPanel(
        tabPanel(
          "Progress by Staff",
          plotlyOutput("progress_by_staff", height = "450px")
        ),
        tabPanel(
          "Progress by Event",
          plotlyOutput("progress_by_event", height = "450px")
        ),
        tabPanel(
          "Staff x Event Heatmap",
          plotlyOutput("heatmap", height = "500px")
        ),
        tabPanel(
          "Summary Table",
          DTOutput("summary_table")
        ),
        tabPanel(
          "Detail Data",
          DTOutput("data_table")
        )
      )
    )
  )
)
```

```{r}
server <- function(input, output, session) {
  
  filtered_data <- reactive({
    df <- data
    
    if (input$staff != "All") {
      df <- df %>% filter(staff == input$staff)
    }
    
    if (input$event_short != "All") {
      df <- df %>% filter(event_short == input$event_short)
    }
    
    if (input$statusId != "All") {
      df <- df %>% filter(statusId == input$statusId)
    }
    
    df
  })
  
  summary_data <- reactive({
    filtered_data() %>%
      group_by(staff, event_short) %>%
      summarise(
        denominator = sum(eligible_flag == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
        numerator = sum(if_else(eligible_flag == 1, coalesce(Score, 0), 0), na.rm = TRUE),
        progress = if_else(denominator > 0, numerator / denominator, NA_real_),
        .groups = "drop"
      )
  })
  
  output$denominator <- renderText({
    sum(filtered_data()$eligible_flag == 1, na.rm = TRUE)
  })
  
  output$numerator <- renderText({
    sum(
      if_else(filtered_data()$eligible_flag == 1,
              coalesce(filtered_data()$Score, 0),
              0),
      na.rm = TRUE
    )
  })
  
  output$progress <- renderText({
    denom <- sum(filtered_data()$eligible_flag == 1, na.rm = TRUE)
    num <- sum(
      if_else(filtered_data()$eligible_flag == 1,
              coalesce(filtered_data()$Score, 0),
              0),
      na.rm = TRUE
    )
    
    if (denom == 0) {
      "NA"
    } else {
      percent(num / denom, accuracy = 0.1)
    }
  })
  
  output$progress_by_staff <- renderPlotly({
    df <- filtered_data() %>%
      group_by(staff) %>%
      summarise(
        denominator = sum(eligible_flag == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
        numerator = sum(if_else(eligible_flag == 1, coalesce(Score, 0), 0), na.rm = TRUE),
        progress = if_else(denominator > 0, numerator / denominator, NA_real_),
        .groups = "drop"
      )
    
    p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = staff, y = progress)) +
      geom_col() +
      scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format()) +
      labs(
        title = "Progress by Staff",
        x = "Staff",
        y = "Progress"
      ) +
      theme_minimal()
    
    ggplotly(p)
  })
  
  output$progress_by_event <- renderPlotly({
    df <- filtered_data() %>%
      group_by(event_short) %>%
      summarise(
        denominator = sum(eligible_flag == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
        numerator = sum(if_else(eligible_flag == 1, coalesce(Score, 0), 0), na.rm = TRUE),
        progress = if_else(denominator > 0, numerator / denominator, NA_real_),
        .groups = "drop"
      )
    
    p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = event_short, y = progress)) +
      geom_col() +
      scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format()) +
      labs(
        title = "Progress by Event",
        x = "Event",
        y = "Progress"
      ) +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
      )
    
    ggplotly(p)
  })
  
  output$heatmap <- renderPlotly({
    df <- summary_data()
    
    p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = event_short, y = staff, fill = progress)) +
      geom_tile() +
      scale_fill_continuous(labels = percent_format()) +
      labs(
        title = "Staff by Event Progress Heatmap",
        x = "Event",
        y = "Staff",
        fill = "Progress"
      ) +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
      )
    
    ggplotly(p)
  })
  
  output$summary_table <- renderDT({
    datatable(
      summary_data() %>%
        mutate(progress = percent(progress, accuracy = 0.1)),
      options = list(
        pageLength = 20,
        scrollX = TRUE
      )
    )
  })
  
  output$data_table <- renderDT({
    datatable(
      filtered_data(),
      options = list(
        pageLength = 20,
        scrollX = TRUE
      )
    )
  })
}
```


```{r}
shinyApp(ui = ui, server = server)
```
